_comment: Mock ERP dataset (see contracts/ + .agent/Tasks/active/llm_orchestrated_disassembly_plan.md). One entry per operator-selectable product; parts are listed in the ERP's canonical removal order, which StaticPlanProvider uses as-is and LlmPlanProvider may re-order (permutation-validated). Override the path via ERP_PRODUCTS_PATH.

gearbox-demo.name: Demo gearbox
gearbox-demo.description: Small demonstration gearbox used for the hackathon work cell: a top cover over a mounting bracket that retains the main gear.

parts.action: lift the top cover straight up
parts.notes: sits loosely on locating pins; no fasteners

parts.action: slide the mounting bracket out sideways
parts.notes: held by the cover; free once the cover is off

parts.action: pull the main gear off its shaft
parts.notes: light press fit on the shaft; retained by the bracket

valve-block.name: Pneumatic valve block
valve-block.description: Valve manifold with a solenoid on top and two fittings on the side face.

parts.action: lift the solenoid off the manifold
parts.notes: plugged onto the pilot port; pull straight up

parts.action: pull the left push-in fitting out of the manifold
pull the right push-in fitting out of the manifold
